text.title: Business Analysis Planning Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: decide-ka1-vs-lean
step.action: Apply Skip-If rules — solo MVP / pure-Scrum / continuous-discovery skip KA1.
step.decision-gate: If decision != ka1, STOP and apply lean canvas instead.

step.name: draft-t1-approach
step.action: Choose plan-driven/change-driven percentages per artefact; name one approver.

step.name: draft-t2-stakeholders
step.action: Cross-check every named role against org chart; categorise sponsor/user/implementer/regulator/support.
step.output: T2 markdown with verified stakeholder table
step.decision-gate: Reject any name absent from org chart.

step.name: draft-t3-governance
step.action: Name approver per artefact type; declare escalation path; set sign-off thresholds.
step.decision-gate: All approvers must be emails or @-handles, not roles.

step.name: draft-t4-info-mgmt
step.action: Pick repo path; declare retention policy; list access.

step.name: draft-t5-performance
step.action: List ≥3 metrics with baseline=null, target=null on cycle 1.

step.name: validate-and-register
step.action: Run scripts/validate-ba-planning.py against bundled JSON; commit when green.
